rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component type or implementation annexes as appropriate
Use assign only for implementation-level bindings when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in type scope only when concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations are available
Write output dependency guarantees in type scope that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
generic_rules: Use exact current-case names from the model index for all identifiers
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in type scope contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assume "label": expression; and guarantee "label": expression; for contracts
Use eq name : type = expression; for equations and const name : type = value; for constants
Use assign output = expression; for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not invent ports/components or copy identifiers from examples
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
